name: Gamma Jack
description:
Keeping a close eye on your friend for the NSA.

Coloring by RobTurb1230 on DeviantArt.

(Do you all think he’d be a closeted homophobe back in the day? I feel like he’d be a closeted homophobe - I made him into a closeted homophobe. Do what you will with that little piece of information.)
